name: visual-canvas
description: Single-entry Codex-native local HTML report and artifact workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Generate polished local HTML reports and reusable HTML artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Visual Canvas provides one public router skill for producing compact project-backed local HTML artifacts with diagrams, charts, SVG, optional generated images, persistent profiles, and reusable HTML output policy guidance. General visual plans and recaps belong to the installed Agent-Native skills.
defaultPrompt: Use $visual-canvas to make a visual report.
Use $visual-canvas to make a local HTML technical report.
Use $visual-canvas to apply HTML output policy.
